source.query:
SELECT c.id           AS id_condition,
       e.id_patient   AS id_patient,
       e.id           AS id_encounter,
       e.begin_date   AS on_set_date,
       i.code_dot     AS code_icd_10,
       i.name_english AS name_english,
       i.name_czech   AS name_czech
FROM patient.condition c
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON c.id_encounter = e.id
         JOIN standard_dict.icd_10 i ON c.code_icd_10::text = i.code::text

ecg.query:
SELECT e.id AS id_ecg,
        enc.id_patient,
        enc.id AS id_encounter,
        o.id_department,
        exec_date,
        vent_rate,
        average_rr,
        sample_freq,
        num_qrs,
        pr_duration,
        qrs_duration,
        qt,
        qtc,
        qtb,
        qtf,
        p_axis,
        qrs_axis,
        t_axis,
        st_elevation,
        ischema_sign,
        inter_text,
        er.rhythms AS rhythm_types
    FROM ecg.ecg e
    INNER JOIN patient.observation o ON e.id_observation = o.id
    INNER JOIN patient.encounter enc ON enc.id = o.id_encounter
    INNER JOIN (SELECT id_ecg, string_agg(nullif(inter_text, ''), ' || ') AS inter_text
        FROM ecg.interpret i 
        GROUP BY id_ecg) AS mi ON e.id = mi.id_ecg
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT id_ecg, array_agg(loinc) AS rhythms
        FROM ecg.ecg_rhythm
        GROUP BY id_ecg
    ) AS er ON e.id = er.id_ecg

echoObservation.query:
SELECT th.id AS id_echo,
       e.id_patient,
       e.id  AS id_encounter,
       po.id_department,
       th.date_exec,
       th.rhythm,
       th.bsa
FROM heart_echo.tte_header th,
     patient.observation po,
     patient.encounter e
WHERE th.id_observation = po.id
  AND po.id_encounter = e.id

echoMeasurements.query:
SELECT echodata.*,
       dict.loinc_code,
       dict.his_shortcut,
       dict.loinc_common_name,
       dict.loinc_unit,
       dict.icrc_name
FROM heart_echo.tte_data echodata
         JOIN heart_echo.us_dict dict ON echodata.id_dict = dict.id

source.query:
SELECT
    e.id            AS id_encounter,
    e.id_patient    AS id_patient,
    e.id_department AS id_department,
    es.code         AS status,
    ec.code         AS class,
    e.begin_date    AS begin_date,
    e.end_date      AS end_date,
    STRING_AGG(c.id::text, ',') AS id_condition_main_diagnosis,
    dr.code_cz      AS discharge_ref_code,
    clinic.nis_name as clinic_name
FROM patient.encounter e
JOIN patient_dict.encounter_status es
    ON e.id_encounter_status = es.id
JOIN patient_dict.encounter_class ec
    ON e.id_encounter_class = ec.id
LEFT JOIN patient.condition c
    ON e.id = c.id_encounter
LEFT JOIN patient_dict.discharge_ref dr
    ON e.id_discharge_ref = dr.id
left join hospital.department dep
	on e.id_department = dep.id
left join hospital.clinic clinic
	on dep.id_clinic = clinic.id
GROUP BY
    e.id,
    e.id_patient,
    e.id_department,
    es.code,
    ec.code,
    e.begin_date,
    e.end_date,
    dr.code_cz,
    clinic.nis_name

SELECT l.id            AS id_lab,
       e.id_patient    AS id_patient,
       e.id            AS id_encounter,
       l.id_department AS id_department,
       l.exec_date     AS effective_date,
       lc.id     AS individual_lab_id,
       lc.lab_name_his AS lab_name_his,
       lc.code_loinc   AS code_loinc,
       ld.value        AS value_result,
       ld.unit         AS value_unit
FROM patient.lab l
         JOIN lab.lab_data ld ON l.id = ld.id_lab
         JOIN patient.observation o ON l.id_observation = o.id
         JOIN lab.lab_code lc ON ld.id_lab_code = lc.id
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON o.id_encounter = e.id

SELECT 
    e.id_patient,
    e.end_date AS date,
    med.id_encounter,
    med.atc_complex,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.id) AS ids,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.atc) AS atcs,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.period_unit) AS period_units,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.period) AS periods,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.frequency) AS frequencies,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.status) AS statuses,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.code) AS codes,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.drug_name) AS drug_names,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.dose_unit) AS dose_units,
    ARRAY_AGG(med.dose_value) AS dose_values
FROM patient.medication_administration med
JOIN patient.encounter e 
    ON e.id = med.id_encounter
GROUP BY e.id_patient, e.end_date, med.id_encounter, med.atc_complex

SELECT p.id                 AS id_procedure,
       e.id_patient         AS id_patient,
       e.id                 AS id_encounter,
       obs.id_department    AS id_department,
       p.perform_dt         AS perform_dt,
       es.code              AS status,
       pdict.code_cz        AS code_local,
       pdict.name_cz        AS name_local,
       icd10pcs.code        AS code_icd10pcs,
       icd10pcs.short_descr AS descr_icd10pcs,
       snomed.sctid         AS outcome_snomed_code,
       snomed.text          AS outcome_snomed_descr
FROM patient.procedure p
         JOIN patient.observation obs ON p.id_observation = obs.id
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON obs.id_encounter = e.id
         JOIN patient_dict.event_status es ON p.id_event_status = es.id
         JOIN patient_dict.procedure_dict pdict ON p.id_procedure_dict = pdict.id
         LEFT JOIN standard_dict.icd_10_pcs icd10pcs ON p.id_procedure_dict = icd10pcs.id
         LEFT JOIN standard_dict.snomed_ct snomed ON p.outcome = snomed.sctid

SELECT p.id                 AS id_procedure,
       e.id_patient         AS id_patient,
       e.id                 AS id_encounter,
       sur.id_department    AS id_department,
       p.perform_dt         AS perform_dt,
       es.code              AS status,
       pdict.code_cz        AS code_local,
       pdict.name_cz        AS name_local,
       icd10pcs.code        AS code_icd10pcs,
       icd10pcs.short_descr AS descr_icd10pcs,
       snomed.sctid         AS outcome_snomed_code,
       snomed.text          AS outcome_snomed_descr
FROM patient.procedure p
         JOIN patient.surgery sur ON p.id_observation = sur.id
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON sur.id_encounter = e.id
         JOIN patient_dict.event_status es ON p.id_event_status = es.id
         JOIN patient_dict.procedure_dict pdict ON p.id_procedure_dict = pdict.id
         LEFT JOIN standard_dict.icd_10_pcs icd10pcs ON p.id_procedure_dict = icd10pcs.id
         LEFT JOIN standard_dict.snomed_ct snomed ON p.outcome = snomed.sctid

SELECT s.id            AS id_symptom,
       e.id_patient    AS id_patient,
       e.id            AS id_encounter,
       o.id_department AS id_department,
       o.value_dt      AS observation_date_time,
       s.snomed        AS code_snomed,
       s.value_boolean AS value,
       oc.code         AS category_code,
       oc.text         AS category_text
FROM patient.symptom s
         JOIN patient.observation o ON s.id_observation = o.id
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON o.id_encounter = e.id
         JOIN patient_dict.observation_cathegory oc ON o.id_observation_cathegory = oc.id

SELECT vs.id                 AS id_vital_sign,
       e.id_patient          AS id_patient,
       e.id                  AS id_encounter,
       e.id_department       AS id_department,
       o.value_dt            AS efective_datetime,
       vs.body_weight        AS weight,
       vs.body_height        AS height,
       vs.systolic_pressure  AS systolic,
       vs.diastolic_pressure AS diastolic,
       vs.heard_rate         AS heart_rate,
       vs.respirate_rate     AS respiration,
       vs.oxygen_saturation  AS spo2,
       vs.body_temperature   AS body_temperature,
       vs.nyha               AS nyha
FROM patient.vital_sign vs
         JOIN patient.observation o ON vs.id_observation = o.id
         JOIN patient.encounter e ON o.id_encounter = e.id

rhc.query:
select rhc.*,e.id_patient, e.id as encounterId
from catheterization.right_heart_catheterization rhc
join patient.observation o on rhc.id_observation = o.id 
join patient.encounter e on e.id = o.id_encounter

medReq.query:
SELECT 
    e.id_patient,
    e.end_date AS date,
    mr.id_encounter,
    mr.atc_complex,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.id) AS ids,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.atc) AS atcs,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.period_unit) AS period_units,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.period) AS periods,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.frequency) AS frequencies,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.status) AS statuses,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.code) AS codes,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.drug_name) AS drug_names,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.dose_unit) AS dose_units,
    ARRAY_AGG(mr.dose_value) AS dose_values
FROM patient.medication_request mr
JOIN patient.encounter e 
    ON e.id = mr.id_encounter
GROUP BY e.id_patient, e.end_date, mr.id_encounter, mr.atc_complex

mri.query:
with combined as (
    select header.id,
           header.date_exec,
           header.res,
           observation.id_encounter,
           e.id_patient,
           data.id as itemId,
           data.value,
           data.qualifier,
           dict.code,
           dict.abbr,
           dict.default_unit,
           dict.value_type,
           map.code as ai4hfCode,
           map.loinc as loincCode
    from heart_mri.header header 
    left join patient.observation observation on header.id_observation = observation.id
    left join patient.encounter e on e.id = observation.id_encounter
    left join heart_mri.data data on header.id = data.id_header 
    left join heart_mri.fnusa_dict dict on data.id_dict = dict.id
    left join heart_mri.ai4hf_map map on map.id_fnusa_dict = dict.id

    union all

    select header.id,
           header.date_exec,
           header.res,
           observation.id_encounter,
           e.id_patient,
           finding.id as itemId,
           null::numeric as value,
           finding.qualifier,
           dict.code,
           dict.abbr,
           dict.default_unit,
           dict.value_type,
           map.code as ai4hfCode,
           map.loinc as loincCode
    from heart_mri.header header 
    left join patient.observation observation on header.id_observation = observation.id
    left join patient.encounter e on e.id = observation.id_encounter
    left join heart_mri.finding finding on header.id = finding.id_header
    left join heart_mri.fnusa_dict dict on finding.id_dict = dict.id
    left join heart_mri.ai4hf_map map on map.id_fnusa_dict = dict.id
)
select id,
       date_exec,
       id_encounter,
       res,
       id_patient,
       count(itemId) as item_count,
       array_agg(coalesce(value::text, '')) as values,
       array_agg(coalesce(qualifier, '')) as qualifiers,
       array_agg(coalesce(code, '')) as codes,
       array_agg(coalesce(abbr, '')) as abbrs,
       array_agg(coalesce(default_unit, '')) as units,
       array_agg(coalesce(value_type, '')) as valueTypes,
       array_agg(coalesce(ai4hfCode, '')) as cdmcodes,
       array_agg(coalesce(loincCode, '')) as loincCodes
from combined
group by id,date_exec,id_encounter,res,id_patient
